smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers later. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts, becoming northerlies.
Temperature falling slightly. Mainly cloudy. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 5 north to northeasterly winds, becoming easterlies with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 5 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
